text:
Created attachment 215660
Update mysqlwsrep56-server to 5.6.48-25.30.

Runtime dependencies lsof and netcat were removed as not needed anymore.

Uses mysql:56 was added.

Portlint passes with warnings.

Pourdriere testport passes for 11.3-RELEASE, 11.4-RELEASE, 12.1-RELEASE.
